D

disconnect(UUID, UUID, UUID) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Closes an infobase connection.
dropInfoBase(UUID, UUID, int) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes an infobase.
dropSecurityProfile(UUID, String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes a security profile.
dropSecurityProfileAddIn(UUID, String, String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes an allowed add-in of a security profile.
dropSecurityProfileApplication(UUID, String, String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes an allowed application of a security profile.
dropSecurityProfileComClass(UUID, String, String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes an allowed COM class of a security profile.
dropSecurityProfileInternetResource(UUID, String, String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes an Internet resource of a security profile.
dropSecurityProfileUnsafeExternalModule(UUID, String, String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes an allowed unsafe external module of a security profile.
dropSecurityProfileVirtualDirectory(UUID, String, String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes a virtual directory of a security profile.
